summary: Iteration 188 testing complete: Cosmic Map GPS page with Leaflet/OpenStreetMap, Resonance Forge mini-game, Exponential Decay engine. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Cosmic Map page with dark CARTO tiles, 10 procedurally generated nodes (4 kinetic + 3 botanical + 3 star_anchor), HUD overlay with coordinates and node counts, node detail panel with harvest functionality, Resonance Forge panel on Mastery Avenues, decay warning system, and Cosmic Map navigation in Explore menu.
critical_code_review_comments: Cosmic Map GPS implementation correctly uses Leaflet with dark CARTO tiles
Node generation uses daily seed for consistency - 4 kinetic + 3 botanical + 3 star_anchor = 10 nodes
Harvest radius is 50m with proper distance calculation using Haversine-like formula
Decay engine uses exponential decay formula: y = a * 0.9^days_inactive with MIN_RESONANCE_FLOOR = 5
Forge mini-game has 3 patterns (kinetic_amplifier, zen_flow, chrono_alchemist) with 13 waveform points each
Forge attempt validates waveform match with tolerance and time limit, requires owning prerequisite items
Navigation menu correctly includes 'Cosmic Map' under Explore category
Mastery Avenues page shows Resonance Forge panel and Cosmic Map navigation button
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 188 Cosmic Map GPS features all working. Test user has: 314 Resonance, 203 Kinetic Dust, 62 Science Resonance, Seeker tier. The Cosmic Map page at /cosmic-map shows a Leaflet map with dark CARTO tiles, 10 procedurally generated nodes (4 kinetic/orange, 3 botanical/teal, 3 star_anchor/purple). Clicking a node shows detail panel with reward, distance, and harvest range. Harvesting requires being within 50m. The Resonance Forge panel on /mastery-avenues shows 'Acquire items from the Circular Economy to unlock Forge recipes' since test user hasn't purchased required items. Decay warning appears when user is inactive >0.5 days. Auth flow: use /auth page, dismiss trial modal with 'Continue with free plan'.

backend_apis.GET /api/cosmic-map/decay-status: Returns decay info with days_inactive, decay_factor, projected values, at_risk flag, pulse_speed
backend_apis.POST /api/cosmic-map/apply-decay: Applies exponential decay calculation, returns decayed boolean and loss amounts
backend_apis.POST /api/cosmic-map/forge/attempt: Validates waveform match, returns accuracy, time_bonus, total_score, forged status
backend_apis.POST /api/cosmic-map/nodes: Returns 10 procedurally generated nodes (4 kinetic + 3 botanical + 3 star_anchor)
backend_apis.POST /api/cosmic-map/harvest: Harvests node if within 50m, returns distance error if too far
backend_apis.GET /api/cosmic-map/harvest-history: Returns harvest history with today_count and today_rewards

frontend_pages.leaflet_map: Dark CARTO tiles visible with proper attribution
frontend_pages.map_hud: Shows coordinates (40.7128, -74.0060) and node type counts (4, 3, 3)
frontend_pages.node_markers: 10 SVG node icons visible (kinetic=orange lightning, botanical=teal leaf, star_anchor=purple star)
frontend_pages.node_detail_panel: Slide-up panel shows node name, rarity, reward, distance, harvest range
frontend_pages.harvest_button: Visible when within 50m range, shows distance message when too far
frontend_pages.forge_panel: Shows 'Acquire items from Circular Economy to unlock Forge recipes'
frontend_pages.navigation_cosmic_map: Cosmic Map link visible in Explore dropdown menu

decay_system.pulse_speed: Increases with days inactive (0.5 + days * 0.3, max 3.0)
